content:
# Multi-Spoke Design: Complete (2026-03-28)

All review fixes incorporated into main design docs. Design is implementation-ready.

## Final Documents
1. `2026-03-28-multi-spoke-workspace-brainstorm.md` - Architecture, decisions, PoC results
2. `2026-03-28-spoke-cli-design.md` - CLI commands, HubContext, entrypoint, Dockerfile, test plan
3. `2026-03-28-spoke-dashboard-design.md` - AgentsView enhancement, Docker graceful degradation
4. `2026-03-28-spoke-design-review-summary.md` - 5-persona review audit trail
5. `2026-03-28-spoke-design-review-fixes.md` - Review fixes audit trail (incorporated)

## Key Changes from Review
- MCP bearer token auth on writes
- Per-spoke cryptographic agent tokens
- Non-root containers, pinned Claude Code version
- Resource limits (4GB default), log rotation
- Pre-flight validation, startup health gate, error reporting
- Deterministic network selection
- Container detection check
- Test plan with unit/integration/E2E/negative/platform matrix
- Telemetry for audit log, metrics, spoke log capture (not corvia_write)

Ready for GitHub issues and implementation.
